title: penstemon hartwegii
intro: Penstemon hartwegii, also known as the Hairy Beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which contain compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Penstemon hartwegii include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs.
